name: Boss threatened to fire me after I fell at work, is that legal?

mainEntity.name: Boss threatened to fire me after I fell at work, is that legal?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, illegal retaliation; report to Labor Commission for protection.
acceptedAnswer.description: Utah/Idaho law prohibits retaliation for filing legitimate workers' comp claims; file complaint with Labor Commission if fired/threatened. Damages include back pay, reinstatement[3]. Key factors: Prove temporal link (claim then adverse action). Document threats. Anti-retaliation strong.

description: No, illegal retaliation; report to Labor Commission for protection.
